message:
fix(security): length-prefix hash inputs in sdk/verifier_sdk binding hashes (bd-3h8j)

verify_artifact() and verify_capsule() used pipe-delimited format! strings
for binding_hash computation, allowing hash collisions when field values
contain the delimiter character. Replaced with length-prefixed encoding via
new deterministic_hash_fields() helper. 3 regression tests added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
